cases.scenario: A non-trivial behavior bug crosses UI, command, state, and persistence layers, and the owning symbols and closest tests are unknown.
expected: Run exactly one fresh gpt-5.6-terra scout without parent conversation history.
Return and locally verify a minimal code-scout.v1 map containing implementation, coupled, test, and relevant constraint targets.

cases.scenario: The user requests a bounded change to one named symbol in one named file, and nearby inspection is sufficient.
expected: Skip the scout because ownership and scope are already explicit.
Use narrow local inspection and proportional validation.

cases.scenario: The task changes only documentation and needs no implementation search.
expected: Do not pay delegation overhead for a task with no code-discovery need.

cases.scenario: The scout returns prose around JSON, an unsafe path, no implementation owner, and a test target whose only symbol is the generic identifier test.
expected: Reject the result without consuming it.
Send the same scout one focused correction listing only the validation defects and require a complete replacement object with an exact test or suite title.

cases.scenario: The corrected scout response is still malformed or insufficient.
expected: Stop the scout workflow after the single correction.
Report the failure briefly and continue with the narrowest safe local discovery without lowering the contract.

cases.scenario: Tracked or non-ignored untracked content changes while the scout is searching.
expected: Reject the stale map when the pre-scout, scout, and post-scout fingerprints differ.
Inspect and preserve the shared-workspace changes without reverting them or claiming that the scout caused them.

cases.scenario: The fresh-agent tool does not expose gpt-5.6-terra.
expected: Do not silently substitute another model; continue with the narrowest safe local discovery.

cases.scenario: The repository does not contain the requested behavior and the scout returns a valid not_found map with concrete evidence.
expected: Accept the bounded not_found result instead of forcing speculative targets.
Continue locally only when another narrow repository check is useful.

cases.scenario: A verified code-scout.v1 map already exists for the same task and repository fingerprint.
expected: Do not spawn another scout unless the task scope or repository state materially changes.
